findings.title: Lazarus Group Linked to Medusa Ransomware — US Healthcare Targeted
findings.summary: North Korean Lazarus group now operating Medusa ransomware against US healthcare, marking escalation from espionage to direct ransomware extortion.

findings.title: BeyondTrust CVE-2026-1731 — Active Scanning Confirmed by GreyNoise
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support and Privileged Remote Access
findings.summary: GreyNoise confirms active scanning within 24h of PoC; single IP accounts for 86% of probes; attackers targeting non-standard ports to evade detection.

findings.title: ShinyHunters Claims Odido Breach — Millions of Dutch Telecom Users
findings.summary: ShinyHunters extortion gang claims breach of Dutch telecom provider Odido, stealing millions of subscriber records.

findings.title: EnOcean SmartServer IoT — Two New Vulnerabilities
findings.summary: Claroty Team82 disclosed two vulnerabilities in EnOcean SmartServer IoT devices used in building automation systems.

findings.title: Six New OpenClaw Vulnerabilities Disclosed by Endor Labs
findings.summary: Six new vulnerabilities in OpenClaw expanding the attack surface for AI agent infrastructure; fourth week of OpenClaw security issues.

findings.title: Cisco Warns AI MCP Infrastructure Is 'Woefully Insecure'
findings.affected_technology: Model Context Protocol (MCP) for AI agents
findings.summary: Cisco warns MCP has fundamental security weaknesses creating broad attack surfaces as enterprises deploy AI agents at scale.

noted.summary: Data breach confirmed via vishing attack; undisclosed number of customers affected.
14.7M installs with security flaws that could expose sensitive medical data.
Japanese chip-testing giant hit by ransomware.
West African airline hit by ransomware with data exfiltration claims.
Analysis of malicious OpenClaw skills containing hidden payloads targeting AI agent users.
